name: Tadalafil safety, interactions, and adverse events targeted baseline search

search_queries.query: CIALIS tadalafil prescribing information contraindications nitrates riociguat alpha blockers alcohol CYP3A4 adverse reactions
tadalafil nitrates interaction 24 hours 48 hours Kloner
tadalafil alpha blocker doxazosin tamsulosin hemodynamic interaction healthy men
tadalafil antihypertensive medications pooled safety hypotension major adverse cardiovascular events
search_queries.result_count: targeted web and PubMed result set

search_queries.query: tadalafil adverse events systematic review meta-analysis benign prostatic hyperplasia serious adverse events
search_queries.result_count: targeted web and PubMed result set

inclusion_criteria: Current official tadalafil/CIALIS regulatory labeling for contraindications, warnings, precautions, drug interactions, dose limits, and adverse reactions.
Human clinical pharmacology studies directly measuring tadalafil drug-interaction blood-pressure endpoints.
Pooled clinical trial or meta-analysis evidence that reports hypotension, major adverse cardiovascular events, adverse events, or serious adverse events.
Prioritize tadalafil-specific sources over PDE5-inhibitor class sources.
exclusion_criteria: Commercial drug-information pages when current official labeling was available.
Nonhuman or in vitro sources for this first safety baseline.
Benefit-oriented ED, BPH, PAH, cognition, or exercise studies without extractable safety or interaction data.
Individual case reports reserved for a later rare-signal review unless needed to define current label warnings.
dedupe_method: Manual deduplication by title, PMID/DOI, label setid, and source purpose.

screening_decisions.title: DailyMed - CIALIS tadalafil tablet, film coated
screening_decisions.reason: Current U.S. label revised March 2026; authoritative for contraindications, warnings, interactions, dose limits, adverse reactions, and postmarketing signals.

screening_decisions.title: Time course of the interaction between tadalafil and nitrates.
screening_decisions.reason: Randomized crossover clinical pharmacology study directly measuring tadalafil 20 mg and sublingual nitroglycerin timing.

screening_decisions.title: Interaction between the phosphodiesterase 5 inhibitor, tadalafil and 2 alpha-blockers, doxazosin and tamsulosin in healthy normotensive men.
screening_decisions.reason: Randomized crossover clinical pharmacology studies in healthy men that directly compare alpha-blocker hemodynamic interaction patterns.

screening_decisions.title: Analysis of integrated clinical safety data of tadalafil in patients receiving concomitant antihypertensive medications.
screening_decisions.reason: Large pooled analysis of 72 phase II-IV ED/BPH studies reporting hypotension-related TEAEs and MACE by antihypertensive co-use.

screening_decisions.title: Efficacy and safety of tadalafil monotherapy for lower urinary tract symptoms secondary to benign prostatic hyperplasia: a meta-analysis.
screening_decisions.reason: Randomized-trial meta-analysis reporting serious adverse events for daily-use BPH populations.

screening_decisions.title: Cardiovascular safety update of Tadalafil: retrospective analysis of data from placebo-controlled and open-label clinical trials of Tadalafil with as needed, three times-per-week or once-a-day dosing.
screening_decisions.reason: Relevant broad cardiovascular safety source, but not staged in this first bundle because the 2022 pooled analysis gives a more current hypotension/MACE lens and the label covers high-risk exclusions.

screening_decisions.title: Individual case reports and pharmacovigilance reports for rare tadalafil-associated events
screening_decisions.reason: Potentially useful for a rare-signal review, but too heterogeneous for the first baseline claim and already represented by current label postmarketing warnings.

screening_decisions.title: Commercial drug interaction checkers for tadalafil
screening_decisions.reason: Useful clinically but not needed for source-backed baseline when official label and primary interaction studies are available.

screening_decisions.title: General PDE5-inhibitor class safety reviews
screening_decisions.reason: The first baseline prioritizes tadalafil-specific labeling and tadalafil-specific human studies.

screening_summary: Targeted searches identified current CIALIS labeling plus tadalafil-specific interaction and pooled safety evidence sufficient for a first baseline. The staged claim emphasizes hard contraindications, dose/exposure modifiers, common adverse reactions, rare serious warnings, and directness limits for mostly healthy men age 30 to 50.
limitations: Targeted baseline search rather than a full systematic review.
The included trial and pooled safety sources mostly involve ED/BPH populations, not healthy off-label enhancement users.
Rare adverse events are primarily represented through label warnings and postmarketing summaries rather than case-level causality review.
Pulmonary arterial hypertension dosing and safety were not separately reviewed.
